```json
  "findings": [
    "Single-angle photograph prevents verification of bonding conductor size, termination torque, and required clearances.",
    "Critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension referenced by NEC 250.104 / 250.30 is outside the frame.",
    "Cannot confirm bonding jumper continuity, proper termination, or compliance with engineered drawings and specifications."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Obtain additional photographs from multiple angles showing the bonding conductor, termination points, and any labels or torque markings.",
    "Verify bonding conductor size against NEC 250.104 and 250.30 requirements for the specific equipment and system grounding.",
    "Confirm torque values and clearances per manufacturer specifications and engineered drawings before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "The available evidence is insufficient to confirm compliance with NEC 250.104 and 250.30 because the critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension is not visible. A single-angle photograph at rough-complete stage does not allow verification of bonding conductor sizing, termination integrity, or required clearances. Therefore, the decision is needs_more_info rather than pass or fail.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104 - Bonding of Piping Systems and Exposed Structural Steel",
    "NEC 250.30 - Grounding and Bonding of Separately Derived Systems"
  ]
}
```
